search.query: index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:summary" | sort - _time | head 1 | fields daily_active_user_count
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:summary" | sort - _time | head 1 | fields daily_adoption_rate
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:cost" | eval cost_usd=coalesce(total_cost_usd, tonumber(amount)/100) | stats sum(cost_usd) AS total_spend | eval total_spend=round(total_spend,2)
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:usage" | stats sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens

index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:spend_limit" | eval spend_limit_usd=coalesce(spend_limit_usd, if(isnull(amount) OR amount="", null(), tonumber(amount)/100)) | eval period_spend_usd=coalesce(period_spend_usd, tonumber(period_to_date_spend)/100) | eval utilization_pct=coalesce(utilization_pct, if(spend_limit_usd>0, round(100*period_spend_usd/spend_limit_usd,1), null())) | where utilization_pct>=80 OR amount="0" | stats count
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:summary" | timechart avg(daily_active_user_count) AS dau avg(weekly_active_user_count) AS wau
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:summary" | timechart avg(daily_adoption_rate) AS daily avg(monthly_adoption_rate) AS monthly
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:usage" | stats sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens sum(uncached_input_tokens) AS input_tokens by product
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:cost" | eval cost_usd=coalesce(total_cost_usd, tonumber(amount)/100) | stats sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd by product | sort - spend_usd
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:cost" | eval cost_usd=coalesce(total_cost_usd, tonumber(amount)/100) | timechart sum(cost_usd) AS spend_usd
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:usage" | timechart sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens sum(uncached_input_tokens) AS input_tokens

index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_cost" | eval cost_usd=coalesce(total_cost_usd, tonumber(amount)/100) | stats latest(cost_usd) AS cost_usd by email | sort - cost_usd | head 15 | rename email AS user

index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:user_usage" | stats sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens sum(uncached_input_tokens) AS input_tokens by email | eval total_tokens=output_tokens+input_tokens | sort - total_tokens | head 15 | table email, output_tokens, input_tokens, total_tokens

index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:spend_limit" | eval spend_limit_usd=coalesce(spend_limit_usd, if(isnull(amount) OR amount="", null(), tonumber(amount)/100)) | eval period_spend_usd=coalesce(period_spend_usd, tonumber(period_to_date_spend)/100) | eval utilization_pct=coalesce(utilization_pct, if(spend_limit_usd>0, round(100*period_spend_usd/spend_limit_usd,1), null())) | where utilization_pct>=80 OR amount="0" | table email, spend_limit_usd, period_spend_usd, utilization_pct, limit_source_type, period | sort - utilization_pct

index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:spend_limit" | eval spend_limit_usd=coalesce(spend_limit_usd, if(isnull(amount) OR amount="", null(), tonumber(amount)/100)) | eval period_spend_usd=coalesce(period_spend_usd, tonumber(period_to_date_spend)/100) | table email, spend_limit_usd, period_spend_usd, utilization_pct, limit_source_type, period | sort - period_spend_usd | head 25
index=$index$ sourcetype="anthropic:analytics:spend_limit_request" status="pending" | table _time, email, status, request_spend_limit_usd, request_period_spend_usd, id | sort - _time
